findings.description: Several specific attribute names from the element tables are absent from hints: `encoding` (config-file要素), `key-name` (entry要素), `value-name` (entry要素), `ref` (property要素). Users searching for these attribute names would not be directed to this section.
findings.source_evidence: config-file attributes table: encoding; entry attributes table: key-name, value-name; property attributes table: ref
